name: Accelerant

description_raw: Whenever you play a card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

description_raw: Whenever you play a Colorless card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

description_raw: Awakens upon losing HP or {Amount:plural:next turn|after [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.

name: Automation
description: Every [blue]10[/blue] cards you draw, gain [energy:1].
description_raw: Every [blue]{BaseCards}[/blue] cards you draw, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.

description: Deals [blue]50%[/blue] more damage when it is attacking you from behind.

description_raw: You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more {Amount:plural:turn|turns} to defeat the Battleworn Dummy.

description_raw: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] on your turn, other players gain half that much [gold]Block[/gold] {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue] times}.

name: Void Form
description: The first [blue]2[/blue] cards you play each turn are free to play.
description_raw: The first {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play each turn {Amount:plural:is|are} free to play.

name: Vulnerable
description: Receive [blue][Damage Increase]%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue][Amount][/blue] turns.
description_raw: Receive [blue]{DamageIncrease:percentMore()}%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.

name: Waste Away
description: Gain [blue][Amount][/blue] less [energy:1] per turn.
description_raw: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} per turn.

name: Weak
description: Attacks deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage for [blue][Amount][/blue] turns.
description_raw: Attacks deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.

name: Well-Laid Plans
description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to [blue][Amount][/blue] cards.
description_raw: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.

name: Wraith Form
description: At the start of your turn, lose [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
description_raw: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
